sections.name: Which investment approach appeals to you most?

options.label: Security matters most – I want steady, predictable growth
I can accept some fluctuations for better returns, but I'd like some protection of my contributions
I'm comfortable taking on risk for better growth prospects, and I accept potential losses
I need strong guarantees and want to minimise the risk of losses
I'm in a solid financial position to handle larger losses if needed

sections.name: How important is sustainability to you?
sections.description: ESG stands for Environmental, Social & Governance – it measures how responsibly a company operates.

options.label: It's not a priority – focus on performance
I'd like some sustainability standards (Article 8 funds and above)
Sustainability is very important to me (Article 9 / high-impact funds only)

sections.name: Do you have a preference for ETFs (index-tracking funds)?
sections.description: ETFs are typically lower-cost and transparent. Actively managed funds aim to beat the market but charge higher fees.

options.label: No preference – include all fund types
I'd prefer ETFs where possible
ETFs only – I want strictly index funds

sections.name: Which regions would you like to invest in?
sections.description: Select all that interest you. We'll use this to prioritize regional exposure while keeping the portfolio diversified.

options.label: Germany – German market focus
Europe – focus on European markets
North America – US and Canadian markets
Asia – developed and emerging Asia
Emerging Markets – high-growth developing economies
Global – anything not covered by the regions above

sections.name: Are there any investment themes you're excited about?
sections.description: Thematic funds focus on specific trends or sectors. These are satellite positions – they won't dominate your portfolio.

options.label: No specific theme – just a well-diversified portfolio
Sustainability & Climate – clean energy, environmental protection
Technology & Innovation – AI, semiconductors, digitalisation
Healthcare & Life Sciences – biotech, medical devices, pharma
Commodities & Raw Materials – metals, energy, agriculture
Infrastructure – transport, utilities, communication networks
Security & Defense – aerospace, defense, cybersecurity
Energy – traditional and renewable energy producers
Megatrends – broad structural growth trends
Water – water supply, treatment and efficiency
AI & Robotics – artificial intelligence and automation
Dividends – stable, income-generating companies

user_answers.risk_approach: string (value from options: conservative | moderate | aggressive)
user_answers.esg_preference: string (value from options: no_requirement | esg_basic | esg_enhanced)
user_answers.etf_preference: string (value from options: no_preference | prefer_etf | etf_only)
preferred_regions: array of strings (values from options: germany | europe | north_america | asia | emerging_markets | global)
preferred_themes: array of strings (values from options: none | sustainability | technology | healthcare | commodities | infrastructure | defense | energy | megatrends | water | ai_robotics | dividends)

server_logs: array of strings capturing backend overrides or warnings
